inProgress.label: Context menu command handlers
inProgress.detail: Right-click context menu commands for users and messages with full decorator support.

inProgress.label: Documentation site
inProgress.detail: Complete guide covering every feature, with examples in English, Portuguese, and Spanish.

inProgress.label: Testing utilities & vitest helpers
inProgress.detail: First-class testing package with mock factories, test containers, and assertion helpers.

inProgress.label: Example bot projects
inProgress.detail: Ready-to-clone starter bots demonstrating slash commands, HTTP APIs, scheduling, and more.

upcoming.label: @spraxium/dashboard: web UI
upcoming.detail: Admin panel for managing bot configuration, viewing logs, and monitoring real-time metrics.

upcoming.label: Plugin registry & marketplace
upcoming.detail: Discover, install, and publish reusable Spraxium plugins from the community.

upcoming.label: Voice state handler decorators
upcoming.detail: Declarative voice channel event handling with join/leave/mute/deafen decorators.

upcoming.label: CLI new project templates v2
upcoming.detail: Revamped scaffolding with interactive prompts, database presets, and deployment configs.

upcoming.label: Rate limiting decorators
upcoming.detail: Built-in per-user and per-guild cooldown decorators for commands and interactions.

upcoming.label: Webhook handler decorators
upcoming.detail: Receive and validate Discord webhook events with typed payload decorators.

upcoming.label: Hot module reload (dev mode)
upcoming.detail: Restart individual modules without dropping the gateway connection during development.

upcoming.label: @spraxium/cache: distributed cache
upcoming.detail: Multi-layer caching with in-memory, Redis, and custom adapter support.

community.label: GraphQL API layer
community.author: community
community.detail: Optional GraphQL schema generation from bot commands for external integrations.

community.label: Docker Compose templates
community.author: community
community.detail: Pre-built docker-compose.yml files for common setups: bot + Redis + Postgres.

community.label: VS Code extension
community.author: community
community.detail: IntelliSense for decorators, inline guard/pipeline visualization, and snippet library.

community.label: Discord Activities support
community.author: community
community.detail: First-class embedded app/activity decorators with iframe SDK integration.

community.label: Event sourcing adapter
community.author: community
community.detail: Replay historical bot events for debugging and audit trail capabilities.

community.label: Multi-bot orchestration
community.author: community
